Package egovframework.let.sym.ccm.zip.service.impl

Class EgovCcmZipManageServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl
egovframework.let.sym.ccm.zip.service.impl.EgovCcmZipManageServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EgovCcmZipManageService
@Service("ZipManageService") public class EgovCcmZipManageServiceImpl extends org.egovframe.rte.fdl.cmmn.EgovAbstractServiceImpl implements EgovCcmZipManageService
우편번호에 대한 서비스 구현클래스를 정의한다
Since:
2009.04.01
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스 개발팀 이중호.
